author: Alex S
subject: doc(theme): Apply community style and reorganize accordingly (algolia/react-instantsearch#1324)
body:
* doc(theme): Apply community style and reorganize accordingly

This layout based on the community standard as seen in the places and
helper websites. There are some missing elements:
 - proper writing of the doc
 - logo
 - style and images for example page
 - content for landing page

* Try removing the file that was blocking the build

* Revert "Try removing the file that was blocking the build"

This reverts commit 66833e96cc67bdddc019574e8105718f4a78e097.

* misc(gitignore): files from a specific root specified with /

* rebase me

* squashhh me

* squash me

* Remove postcss

* Remove unused files
